scripts.bombadil: rm -rf bombadil-report && RUST_LOG=chromiumoxide.handler=error CHROME=chrome/chrome-wrapper.sh bombadil test --headless --time-limit 1m --exit-on-violation http://localhost:8000 --output-path bombadil-report bombadil.spec.ts
scripts.bombadil:headed: rm -rf bombadil-report && RUST_LOG=chromiumoxide.handler=error CHROME=chrome/chrome-wrapper.sh bombadil test --time-limit 1m --exit-on-violation http://localhost:8000 --output-path bombadil-report bombadil.spec.ts
